headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Healthpeak Properties, Raises Price Target to $20
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Richard Hill   maintains Healthpeak Properties (NYSE:DOC) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $18 to $20.
